lex.bot.conversationlogsettings.CfnAbout: Configures conversation logging that saves audio, text, and metadata for the conversations with your users.

lex.bot.conversationlogsettings.AudioLog.Description: The Amazon S3 settings for logging audio to an S3 bucket.

lex.bot.conversationlogsettings.TextLogS.Description: The Amazon CloudWatch Logs settings for logging text and metadata.
